instructions.title: Steps to obtain the "Hik IOT" token
instructions.step1:
1. On your computer browser, open the "Hik IOT" workspace:
https://www.hikiot.com/tenant/workBench
instructions.step2: 2. Log in with the SMS verification code. Make sure the phone number matches the one used in the mini program.
instructions.step3: 3. After logging in, press "F12" to open the developer tools (or right-click the page and choose "Inspect").
instructions.step4: 4. Follow the guide below to copy the value of "www_token" and paste it into the field below.

messages.tokenStored: After a successful login, the token is saved locally in your browser for faster login next time.
messages.tokenExpiry: The token is valid for 30 days. You can reuse it during the validity period and need to retrieve a new one afterward.
messages.tokenLengthError: The token must be 36 characters. Please check and try again.
messages.invalidToken: Invalid token, please retrieve it again.
messages.networkError: Network error, please try again later.
messages.restDayPrompt: Today's rule is rest. Do you still want to check in?

location.title: Location Simulation
location.longitudeError: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180
location.latitudeError: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90
location.wifiMacError: MAC address format must be XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX (hex pairs separated by colons)
location.randomOffsetError: Random offset must be a non-negative integer (meters)

hints.avoidRepeat: Please do not click repeatedly to avoid duplicate check-ins.
hints.timeRestricted: One-click check-in is only available after 8:30 AM.

smsLogin.title: SMS Verification Login
smsLogin.phoneError: Please enter a valid 11-digit phone number
smsLogin.codeSent: Verification code sent, please check your phone
smsLogin.sendFailed: Failed to send, please try again later
smsLogin.fillRequired: Please enter your phone number and verification code
smsLogin.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your verification code
smsLogin.codeSending: Verification code is sending, this operation will take about 10 seconds

schedule.title: Auto Schedule
schedule.desktopPwaOnly: Auto check-in can only be enabled in the installed desktop PWA app.
schedule.desktopPwaOnlyHint: Install this site as an app from a desktop browser, then open it from the app window to enable auto check-in.

guide.title: Auto Check-in Setup
guide.subtitle: Complete these settings before enabling the schedule so the browser is less likely to freeze the page or pause timers.
guide.stepDesktopText: Use this tool in a desktop browser on Windows, macOS, or Linux. Mobile browsers and locked screens are not suitable for scheduled tasks.
guide.stepPwaText: Install this site from the browser address bar or menu, then open it from the standalone app window.
guide.installUnavailable: The install prompt is not available right now. Please install the app from the browser menu.
guide.stepAutoStartText: In the installed app settings, enable auto-start on device login so the app opens after you sign in to the computer.
guide.stepPerformanceText: Open Edge / Chrome performance settings and add {domain} to the never-sleep or always-active whitelist.
guide.completeChecklist: Please complete and confirm all setup items first.
